paragraphs.structure: Seven sentences building from distant approach to decisive leap. Opens with rhythmic sound-image, expands through fleeting civilian perspective, sustains chase energy, climaxes with athletic boarding.
rhetorical-dna: Kinetic verbs anchor each sentence (drummed, swept, jerked, sprang, landed)
Fleeting glimpse technique: protagonist seen through bystander eyes, mythologized by motion
Contrast between crowd chaos and rider's singular focus—he never looks back
Final sentence pivots from observer reaction to actor's decisive move
Sensory layering: sound first, then color, then physical impact
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A pursued figure makes a desperate, athletic escape onto a departing vessel.

paragraphs.structure: Six sentences tracing doom's approach through accumulating casualties. Opens with pursuit closing, tracks death moving through ranks, ends with leadership vacuum filled.
rhetorical-dna: Body-count progression: group casualties, then named individual, then vessel falters
Physical strain made visceral through anatomical metaphor
Emotional punctuation: the sob before death contrasts with curses during life
Ship personified—loses headway, rolls helplessly—mirroring crew's fate
Final sentence withholds method, promising action in next beat
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A vessel's crew falls one by one until a newcomer must seize command.

paragraphs.structure: Four sentences of pure combat fury. Short opener, then three increasingly brutal elaborations. Catalog of violence accelerates through compound verbs.
rhetorical-dna: Hurricane/blur metaphors externalize berserker state
Weapons given agency and sound: sword sings its death-song
Anatomical catalog in accelerating rhythm
Interior state (red mist) bleeds into exterior carnage
Sentence length mirrors escalation: tight opening, then sprawling slaughter
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A warrior enters berserker fury and butchers enemies in graphic excess.

paragraphs.structure: Three sentences building to frozen tableau. First continues violence, second reaches terminal moment, third crystallizes stillness through simile.
rhetorical-dna: Invulnerable opening grants temporary mythic status
Death-readiness as characterization: tensing to leap and die, not retreat
External interruption breaks momentum without protagonist agency
Statue simile freezes all motion simultaneously
Parallel final clause balances opposing forces in stalemate
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A cornered warrior prepares for final stand when outside force freezes the moment.

paragraphs.structure: Three sentences of lyric intensity. Opens with triadic simile chain, middle sentence shows effect on witnesses, long final sentence consummates encounter.
rhetorical-dna: Triadic simile structure elevates action to cosmic force
Opposites yoked: creation and death, blood and starlight, ivory and black
Dying men forgot death—presence suspends mortality itself
Color progression builds through contrast
Final sentence syntactically sprawling, mimicking overwhelming desire
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A mesmerizing figure's performance ends with sudden surrender to the warrior.
